generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a mother and former intelligence analyst, I've seen firsthand how our alliances keep us safe. The recent cyberattacks on our infrastructure prove we can't go it alone. While some worry about burden-sharing, our allies bring unique capabilities we can't replicate alone. Remember - NATO's collective defense isn't just about troops, it's about shared early warning systems and coordinated cyber defenses that protect our families. We can't afford to weaken these bonds in an uncertain world. #NationalSecurity #AllianceStrong
